171

18. UNCHASTITY.
If Venus and Mars exchange their divisions, the female will go after other males. If the Moon be
simultaneously in the 7th House, she will join others with consent of her husband.
19. MOTHER AND DAUGHTER.
If a Sign of Mars, or Saturn be ascending with Venus and the Moon in it in aspect to malefics, the
female along with her mother may be deemed unchaste.
20. MISCELLANEOUS.
If the 7th House falls in a Navansa of Mars and be in aspect to the Moon (Saturn, according to
some texts), the female will have a diseased vagina. A Navansa of Venus denotes a
fortunate female, who will be dear to her husband.
21-24. EFFECTS OF RULERS OF 7th HOUSE/NAVANSA.
